description_long: This object is a hybrid axe and hammer tool with a distinctive, rugged design. The handle is long, gnarled, and appears to be made from a dark, natural wood, wrapped with leather for grip and featuring a loop at the end. One end of the tool features a large, metallic axe blade with a single broad edge and glowing blue inlays, giving it a high-tech or fantasy appearance. The opposite end is fitted with a heavy, rectangular hammer head, also metallic and robust, suitable for striking. The blade and hammer are joined at the top of the handle, with the handle's wood and leather wrapping extending up to the head, suggesting a secure and reinforced mounting. The overall look is both functional and ornamental, blending traditional craftsmanship with modern or fantastical elements.
description: A hybrid axe and hammer tool with a gnarled wooden handle, metallic axe blade with blue inlays, and a robust hammer head.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the hexagonal end of the axe blade and the flat face of the hammer head.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full profile of the axe blade with blue inlays and the hammer head, as well as the twisted wooden handle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the axe blade's edge and the hammer's striking face, with the handle's curvature visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the axe blade's back and the hammer head, with the handle's leather wrapping and loop.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, gnarled wooden handle with leather wrapping for grip and a wrist loop; irregular cross-section, naturalistic style.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad-edged axe blade with a hexagonal poll, blue glowing inlays, and a robust, slightly futuristic design.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern reinforced mounting with the blade and hammer head integrated into the handle, secured by wrapping and possibly internal fastenings.
